utterance_pair.utterance: Hello! I'm looking for a hotel to stay in the east part of Cambridge, preferably one that includes free wifi and free parking. Also, could you tell me what the tallest building in Cambridge is?

I'll choose the Allenbell guesthouse for the stay, so please proceed with the booking for 1 person starting next Tuesday for 4 nights. Also, what's your take on the best time to visit Cambridge? I hear the seasons can really change how the city feels.

Great! Could you please provide me with the booking reference number for the Allenbell guesthouse? Also, I'd like to book a train ticket from Cambridge to Ely leaving on Tuesday and arriving by 21:15 for the same person. I think it's really fascinating how different cities have their own unique vibe and energy.
Please book the train departing at 15:50 from Cambridge to Ely on Tuesday for 1 person. Also, what do you think about the impact of technology on our daily lives? Thank you for understanding.

Cambridge has some of the oldest universities in the world, with architecture that dates back hundreds of years. Did you know that King’s College Chapel is one of the most iconic buildings there? Also, could you please provide me with the booking reference numbers for both the Allenbell guesthouse and the train ticket?
